  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/CheckUser \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \

  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter mediawiki/extensions/AntiSpoof mediawiki/extensions/CentralAuth mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfiguration mediawiki/extensions/DiscussionTools mediawiki/extensions/EventBus mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging mediawiki/extensions/FlaggedRevs mediawiki/extensions/GlobalBlocking mediawiki/extensions/GlobalPreferences mediawiki/extensions/GrowthExperiments mediawiki/extensions/IPInfo mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend mediawiki/extensions/TorBlock mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/ContentTranslation \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/IPInfo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter mediawiki/extensions/BetaFeatures mediawiki/extensions/CheckUser mediawiki/extensions/GlobalPreferences mediawiki/extensions/IPReputation mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Wikibase \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/ArticlePlaceholder mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/cldr mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/Elastica mediawiki/extensions/GeoData mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend mediawiki/extensions/PropertySuggester mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/skins/MinervaNeue mediawiki/extensions/SpamBlacklist mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseCirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseLexeme mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseMediaInfo mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseQualityConstraints mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaBadges

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaCampaignEvents \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CampaignEvents mediawiki/extensions/cldr

  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend mediawiki/extensions/EventBus mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging mediawiki/extensions/EventStreamConfig mediawiki/extensions/TestKitchen
